proposals.title: Risk Desk learning record system is operational
proposals.summary: Risk Desk learning records are now generated each cycle, tracking approved/rejected/watched outcomes and shadow trade estimates.
proposals.currentBehavior: Risk Desk only generates decisions without learning from outcomes.
proposals.proposedChange: No change yet. Learning records are observation-only in this cycle.
proposals.evidence: 12 approved, 20 rejected, 21 watched, 20 shadow trades tracked.
proposals.expectedBenefit: Data foundation for future risk threshold calibration.
proposals.recommendedAction: Review learning records after 2-3 more cycles to identify patterns before adjusting rules.

proposals.title: Consider lowering confidence threshold for high-quality signals
proposals.summary: If shadow tracking shows 4 missed winners with confidence near 0.55, consider adjusting the minimum confidence gate.
proposals.currentBehavior: Risk Desk blocks any signal with confidence below 0.55.
proposals.proposedChange: Gather more data. No change applied this cycle.
proposals.evidence: 20 shadow trades being tracked for confidence threshold analysis.
proposals.expectedBenefit: Capture more valid opportunities without increasing risk exposure.
proposals.recommendedAction: Review after accumulating 50+ shadow trade records.

reviewedBy.feedback: Add specific data on which confidence thresholds missed winners

proposals.title: Review rejection criteria that may have missed winners
proposals.summary: 4 rejected trade(s) have since moved favorably. Review if block rules were appropriate.
proposals.proposedChange: Examine each rejected signal for common patterns in block reasons.
proposals.evidence: 4 rejected signal(s) showing positive price movement since rejection.
proposals.expectedBenefit: Reduce false negatives while maintaining safety boundaries.
proposals.recommendedAction: Examine each rejected signal for common patterns in block reasons.

reviewedBy.reason: Need more shadow trade history before reviewing criteria

proposals.title: Continue shadow tracking for comprehensive learning
proposals.summary: 20 shadow trades tracked for rejected signals. Continue monitoring to build historical performance baseline.
proposals.proposedChange: Run risk:learning each cycle to accumulate more shadow data.
proposals.evidence: Shadow tracking enabled for 20 rejected trades. Price data sourced from Alpaca IEX.
proposals.expectedBenefit: Build historical dataset to calibrate risk thresholds over time.
proposals.recommendedAction: Run risk:learning each cycle to accumulate more shadow data.
